claim: No Stable, release, conformance, or manual assistive-technology claim is made by this source contract.
summary: A persistent page/site aside with exclusive controlled or adapter-persisted dismissal, visible severity, intrinsic reflow, actions, and a native dismiss button.
semantics: The named aside owns its accessible name and remains non-live; unsafe role, naming, visibility, and live-region overrides are rejected while page/site scope stays metadata.
Controlled dismissal only proposes changes. Uncontrolled dismissal alone accepts a default and injected persistence, and persistence writes occur only after committed internal transitions.

A synchronous persistence read resolves in a pre-paint layout effect while pending markup is visually suppressed; failures fall back to the supplied default and are reported without escaping the component.
A 44 CSS-pixel native dismiss button, visible severity text, non-sticky layout, and container-relative reflow avoid focus obstruction, viewport assumptions, and color-only meaning.

preferences.forcedColors: System colors preserve boundaries, text, state, and focus without color-only meaning.
preferences.reducedMotion: No semantic information depends on motion; the one-pixel active press offset is removed when reduced motion is requested.
preferences.rtl: Logical properties mirror layout and bdi isolates localized numeric values where applicable.

responsive.overflowPolicy: An intrinsic container query reflows at narrow embedded widths; text wraps, actions move to their own row, and content remains readable without document clipping or hidden recovery paths.
